texto: I'm married to the street I ain't gonna switch over. I ain't gonna go religion on nobody. I believe in God - God is for the thugs too - but the streets are in the most trouble. So I'mma keep it focused on the streets and the struggle. That's what I'm mainly about.
explicacao: Citação de Trick Daddy sobre temas ligados a fe. “I'm married to the street I ain't gonna switch over. I ain't gonna go religion on nobody. I belie…” articula fe, god, struggle em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como struggle e believe.

frase_original: I'm married to the street I ain't gonna switch over. I ain't gonna go religion on nobody. I believe in God - God is for the thugs too - but the streets are in the most trouble. So I'mma keep it focused on the streets and the struggle. That's what I'm mainly about.
